name: Bestow Curse
description: You touch a creature, which must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be cursed for the duration with one chosen effect: Disadvantage on checks/saves with one ability; Disadvantage on attack rolls against you; a start-of-turn Wisdom save or be forced to Dodge; or +1d8 Necrotic when you damage it. Engine: the WIS save is rolled; the specific curse rider is descriptive only.
scaling: Higher-level slots extend the duration and may drop the Concentration requirement (level 4 → 10 minutes; 5-6 → 8 hours, no Concentration; 7-8 → 24 hours; 9 → until dispelled).
